title: Treme Feta Quesadilla
description: A twist on the classic quesadilla, this recipe incorporates the flavors of New Orleans with a tangy feta cheese and crispy crunch.
instructions: Preheat a large skillet or griddle over medium heat.
Shred the feta cheese and set aside.
In a small bowl, mix together the treme spice blend, red onion, and chopped cilantro.
Place a tortilla in the skillet and sprinkle a quarter of the feta cheese on half of the tortilla.
Top with the treme spice blend mixture and fold the tortilla in half.
Cook for 2-3 minutes or until the tortilla is crispy and the cheese is melted.
Flip the quesadilla and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Repeat with the remaining tortillas and filling ingredients.
Cut into wedges and serve immediately.
